rationale: Qodo review summary only; no requested code change.
Addressed both reported issues by invalidating stale preset previews and writing in-place expansion completion messages to the global preset status.
Added current-state validation before applying async preset expansion results so removed or changed preset steps are not mutated.
Automated Codex review summary; the actionable inline comment is tracked separately.
Preset-step instruction edits now clear cached previews, and tests cover regeneration after instructions change.
Preset selection and preset inputs are disabled while expansion is in progress, with current-state guards before applying async results.
Review-level race-condition recommendation was addressed by disabling preset controls during expansion and guarding stale async results.
